info.eclipticseasons.humidity_tank.use: Increases the ambient humidity inside a greenhouse by %2$d%% within a %1$s block radius when placed
info.eclipticseasons.dehumidifier.use: If suspended in air, it reduces the ambient humidity inside the greenhouse by %2$d%% within a %1$s block radius
info.eclipticseasons.recipe_category.gre: Place outdoors and not in contact with the ground
eclipticseasons.configuration.LowLightGr: Greenhouse Failure Chance in Low Light
eclipticseasons.configuration.title: Settings
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowInFenc: Snow in Fences Only During Snowfall
eclipticseasons.configuration.ForceChunk: Update Chunks on Snow Melt Only
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowInFenc: Snowscape - Snow in Fences and Vegetation
eclipticseasons.configuration.ShouldInit: Initialize Snow in Extreme Cold Biomes
eclipticseasons.configuration.MonthOffse: Shifts the displayed month index. Positive values move months forward. Does not affect solar term logic.
Shifts calendar days relative to solar terms. Used to align solar term day 0 (e.g., Beginning of Spring) with calendar dates.
eclipticseasons.configuration.RenderedSn: Renders snow-covered overlays on most surface blocks after snowfall
Allows vanilla snow accumulation and ice formation in non-cold biomes during freezing weather
Displays additional debug information for solar terms, biomes, weather, and related systems
eclipticseasons.configuration.NaturalSou: Enables ambient environmental and seasonal sounds. Can also be customized through resource packs
eclipticseasons.configuration.ExtraSnowL: Renders an additional snow layer on top of full blocks when using snow-covered models
eclipticseasons.configuration.ExtraSnowD: Provides snow-covered models and definitions for more vanilla blocks. Requires restart
eclipticseasons.configuration.FrozenWate: Experimental feature that renders a thin ice layer on river surfaces during snowfall
eclipticseasons.configuration.SpringGras: Affects temperate biomes. Grasslands will grow short grass and wildflowers in spring, tall grass in summer, then gradually wither through autumn and winter
eclipticseasons.configuration.server_res: §e[Ecliptic Seasons] §7Admin §f%s §7updated the §b%s §7config. §cRestart the server to apply changes.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SmoothSnow: Renders decorative snow edges on adjacent blocks for seamless terrain transitions.
eclipticseasons.configuration.MinChunkCo: Sets the threshold (in ms) for chunk compilation before logging a performance warning.
eclipticseasons.configuration.FrozenWate: If true, the thin ice layer on water can be broken by players/entities.
Prevents the visual frozen water effect in areas with high light levels.
eclipticseasons.configuration.Agricultur: Show tooltips for ideal seasons and humidity levels on crop items.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ItemInform: Show additional information regarding item usage or origins.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SimpleSeas: Whether to enable a simplified HUD overlay that displays the current season and solar term on the screen.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ShowGregor: Display the standard Gregorian year instead of the solar calendar year.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ForceChunk: Periodically force-reloads chunk rendering to fix visual glitches (may impact FPS).
eclipticseasons.configuration.Enhancemen: (ForceChunkRenderUpdate) A more thorough reload that refreshes all chunk sections periodically.
eclipticseasons.configuration.CullTopFac: Optimized rendering: Cull the top face of a block if it is hidden by a snow model.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ResetRende: Refreshes the renderer state immediately after the player wakes up.
eclipticseasons.configuration.UseVanilla: Use standard Vanilla light/sky rules to determine if snow should fall in a location.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowUnderS: Allow decorative snow overlays to appear under solid blocks (e.g., in shadows or under eaves).
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowInFenc: [Sodium/Embeddium] Renders a virtual snow layer inside fences and tall grass for a seamless look.
[Sodium/Embeddium] Minimum number of adjacent snow-covered blocks required to trigger the effect.
[Sodium/Embeddium] Check all eight surrounding directions instead of just the cardinal four.
[Sodium/Embeddium] Render snow layers inside snow-connected fences only when in a snowy state.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ExtraSnowL: [Sodium/Embeddium] Maxmum number of additional snow layer on blocks.
[Sodium/Embeddium] Maxmum number of additional snow layer on leave blocks.
[Sodium/Embeddium] Culling extra fake snow layer for necessary.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SeasonalGr: Apply seasonal color shifts to grass and leaf textures.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SeasonalCo: Extend seasonal color shifts to birch, spruce, and mangrove leaves.
eclipticseasons.configuration.FoliageUnd: Visual detail: Adds a brownish, withered foliage effect under trees during Autumn.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SmootherSe: Calculate seasonal color shifts based on exact solar term progress for smoother transitions.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SeasonalCo:
Custom seasonal colors for single-tint blocks only.
Format: "block_id@color1,color2,...,colorN,placeholder_color,base_color"
The number of colors (N) must be a factor of 24 (e.g., 4, 12, or 24).
- 4 colors: Seasonal (6 terms each)
- 12 colors: Monthly (2 terms each)
The 'placeholder_color' maps to index 24; 'base_color' is the final reference hex.
eclipticseasons.configuration.FlowerOnGr: Visual detail: Occasionally adds small, decorative flowers to grass blocks in Spring.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SeasonalPa: Enable seasonal particles like butterflies, fireflies, and falling leaves.
Spawns butterflies over flowers during Spring.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ButterflyS: Density between butterfly spawns. Higher values result in fewer butterflies.
eclipticseasons.configuration.FallenLeav: Leaf blocks will drop falling leaf particles, peaking in frequency during Autumn.
Density between leaf particles. Higher values result in fewer leaves falling.
eclipticseasons.configuration.Firefly.to: Spawns fireflies near flowers during Summer evenings.
eclipticseasons.configuration.FireflySpa: Density between firefly spawns. Higher values result in fewer fireflies.
Visual effect: Displays wild geese flying south during autumnal transitions.
eclipticseasons.configuration.WildGooseS: Density between wild goose sightings. Higher values result in fewer sightings.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SeasonGree: Emits soft ambient particles when the Season Core or Greenhouse is active.
Density of particles emitted by the Greenhouse effect.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowLeafPa: Breaking snow-covered leaves will release a burst of snow particles.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ForceServe:
Force using server synchronized config when joining a multiplayer server.
If disabled, client keeps its own local config when exit.
eclipticseasons.configuration.LogIllegal: Log errors when internal functions are used incorrectly.
eclipticseasons.configuration.NoSnowyUnd: Prevent snow overlays from rendering under blocks with zero light emission.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowOverla: Allow snow overlays to cover light-emitting blocks.
eclipticseasons.configuration.DisableChu: Keep chunk extra info in memory (disables the cache cleaner).
eclipticseasons.configuration.DisableUni: Prevent biome tags from being rebound (may lead to tag overlapping).
eclipticseasons.configuration.DisableIce: Cauldrons will no longer collect snow or ice during winter weather.
eclipticseasons.configuration.IceAndSnow: Allow accumulated snow layers and ice to melt as the temperature rises.
Allow natural snowfall and snow accumulation during cold periods.
eclipticseasons.configuration.WaterFreez: If enabled, water in frozen biomes follows vanilla behavior and turns into ice.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowKeepIn: Prevents physical snow from melting in naturally snowy biomes, even during hot seasons.
eclipticseasons.configuration.HeatStroke: Apply a 'Heatstroke' status effect if players stay in hot biomes during Summer noon.
eclipticseasons.configuration.LastingDay:
The duration of a single Solar Term in Minecraft days.
Logic: 1 Year = 4 Seasons | 1 Season = 6 Solar Terms.
eclipticseasons.configuration.InitialSol: The index of the Solar Term when the world is first created (1-24).
eclipticseasons.configuration.EnableInfo: Display a chat message whenever the Solar Term changes.
Include a custom icon in the change notification for better visibility.
eclipticseasons.configuration.EnableLoca: Synchronize the in-game calendar and seasonal data with the server/client local time.
eclipticseasons.configuration.CalendarIt: Show a tooltip or message if a calendar item cannot be placed in the current location.
eclipticseasons.configuration.DynamicDay: Adjust daylight duration based on the time of year (longer in Summer, shorter in Winter).
eclipticseasons.configuration.ValidDimen: List of dimension IDs where seasonal effects should be active.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SpringDayT: Daylight length in Ticks for each of the 6 Solar Terms in Spring.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SummerDayT: Daylight length in Ticks for each of the 6 Solar Terms in Summer.
eclipticseasons.configuration.AutumnDayT: Daylight length in Ticks for each of the 6 Solar Terms in Autumn.
eclipticseasons.configuration.WinterDayT: Daylight length in Ticks for each of the 6 Solar Terms in Winter.
eclipticseasons.configuration.NoneDayTim: Default daylight length in Ticks when no seasonal effects are active.
eclipticseasons.configuration.DynamicSno: Introduces random yearly variations to the snowfall date for unpredictability.
eclipticseasons.configuration.RealWorldS:
Sync in-game seasons with the real-world date.
Warning: May cause day-counter or calendar conflicts with other mods.
eclipticseasons.configuration.EnableSeas: Restrict plant growth based on their compatible seasons or humidity.
eclipticseasons.configuration.EnableCrop: Restrict plant growth based on local soil/environmental humidity.
eclipticseasons.configuration.CropHumidi: Smooths out humidity changes between different areas or time periods.
eclipticseasons.configuration.BoneMealFa: Show a message if bone meal fails to work due to incorrect season or humidity.
eclipticseasons.configuration.BoneMealCo: Consume the bone meal item even if the growth attempt fails.
eclipticseasons.configuration.GreenHouse: The horizontal detection radius for the Greenhouse.
The vertical detection height for the Greenhouse.
eclipticseasons.configuration.LowLightGr: Probability (per tick) that greenhouse crops fail to grow due to low light levels.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SimpleGree: Simplifies greenhouse logic, removing the need for core blocks or humidity modifiers.
eclipticseasons.configuration.NoCostHumi: If true, the Humidifier block will not consume resources during operation.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SeasonCore: The effective radius of the 'Season Core' block.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ComplexGre: Enables more precise shape detection for greenhouse structures.
eclipticseasons.configuration.UseBoxDist: Use Manhattan distance (square) instead of Euclidean (circle) for greenhouse range.
eclipticseasons.configuration.RegisterCr: [Deprecated] Use default seasonal/humidity values for unregistered crops.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ForceCompa: Force all plants to follow growth rules, even those without specific mod tags.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SaveChunkE: Saves local humidity data to chunk files for persistent tracking.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SeasonalPr: Adjusts the power of the Seasonal Prayer Ritual. Higher values result in lower bonuses.
The duration required for the Prayer Ritual (relative to one Solar Term).
eclipticseasons.configuration.EnableSeas: Limit animal breeding to their natural, compatible seasons.
eclipticseasons.configuration.EnableTime: Restrict breeding to specific hours of the day.
eclipticseasons.configuration.EnableSeas: Bees become inactive during cold seasons and active during warm ones.
eclipticseasons.configuration.BeePollina:
List of seasons where bees are allowed to pollinate plants.
Default: [SPRING]
eclipticseasons.configuration.BeeActiveS:
List of seasons where bees will leave the hive to fly around.
Default: [SPRING, SUMMER, AUTUMN]
eclipticseasons.configuration.EnableSeas: Modify fishing mechanics based on the current season (e.g., Summer bonuses).
eclipticseasons.configuration.FishingSea:
List of seasons where fishing is most effective.
Default: [SUMMER]
eclipticseasons.configuration.LessFishIn: Decrease the bite rate significantly during active thunderstorms.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SeasonCore: Allow the Season Core to provide breeding bonuses to animals without a greenhouse.
eclipticseasons.configuration.UseSolarWe: Enable localized weather patterns where rain or sun is determined per-biome.
eclipticseasons.configuration.NotRainInD: Disable rain/snow in biomes with no natural precipitation (e.g., Deserts).
eclipticseasons.configuration.ShouldInit: Force initialize weather and snow states when the mod or world is first loaded.
Force initialize snow states for extreme cold biomes when the mod or world is first loaded.
eclipticseasons.configuration.RainChance: Adjust the overall frequency of rain.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ThunderCha: Adjust the overall frequency of thunder.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowAccumu: Adjusts the spread rate of atmospheric snow overlays across the ground.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowMeltSp: Adjusts the recession speed of atmospheric snow overlays during warmer periods.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ClearAfter: Automatically reset weather to clear after the player wakes up from a bed.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ChangeMapC: Synchronize all map color rendering with visual snow overlays. May affect compatibility with other mods.
Only adjust map item colors to reflect visual snow overlays. Safer for mod compatibility.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowyWinte: Controls atmospheric snow overlays during cold weather. Visual snow gradually covers solid blocks and grass, even in warmer biomes.
Apply frost and snow overlays to the undersides of leaves and tree branches.
eclipticseasons.configuration.NotSnowyNe: Prevents snow overlays from building up near blocks that emit significant light.
The minimum light level required to prevent snow accumulation.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ForceBlock: List of Block IDs that will never be covered by snow overlays.
eclipticseasons.configuration.BiomeSnowL: Set custom snow-line altitudes for biomes (e.g., ["#c:is_cold", 200]).
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowInWorl: Track snow based on exact world coordinates (allows for localized snow clearing).
eclipticseasons.configuration.ForceSnowy: (SnowInWorld) Sync chunk snow overlay states immediately when they are loaded.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ForceChunk: (SnowInWorld) Only force chunk snow overlays sync when the weather is warm enough for snow to melt.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowCoverU: (SnowInWorld) Render snow overlays on the sides of blocks located beneath a snow layer block.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowStepMe: (SnowInWorld) Snow layers have a chance to melt when entities walk over them.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowTogeth: Synchronizes the snowfall schedule for all Overworld biomes.
eclipticseasons.configuration.RegionalSn: Aligns snowfall schedules based on three broad climate zones (Warm, Temperate, and Cold) instead of per-biome.
eclipticseasons.configuration.VanillaBio: Enforces original Vanilla temperature and precipitation settings to prevent other mods from creating extreme environmental values.
eclipticseasons.configuration.Independen: When enabled, rivers and other small biomes are treated as independent weather regions. When disabled, they will reference nearby biomes to reduce chunk initialization cost.
eclipticseasons.configuration.SereneSeas: Enables compatibility with mods that utilize Serene Seasons' CropTag system.

Excludes saplings from Serene Seasons' seasonal growth restrictions.
Set to false to force saplings to follow the same seasonal rules as crops.
Automatically assigns humidity requirements to crops based on their Serene Seasons seasonal tags.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ModsWithou:
A blacklist of Mod IDs whose crops should NOT receive automatic humidity assignments.
Example: ["vinery", "meadow"]
eclipticseasons.configuration.FixBiomePr: Intercepts raw biome precipitation queries to ensure small biomes (like rivers) do not disrupt large-scale weather logic.
eclipticseasons.configuration.WeatherVot:
Determines global weather state based on player locations when external mods bypass our API.
This represents the weighted threshold required to trigger a specific weather condition.
eclipticseasons.configuration.DistantHor: Enables winter-themed Level of Detail (LOD) textures for Distant Horizons to ensure visual consistency at long distances.
eclipticseasons.configuration.UnifiedSno: Harmonizes shading parameters for all snow-covered surfaces when using shaders.
Extends unified shading to the side faces of snow-covered blocks.
eclipticseasons.configuration.UnifiedFro: Shader Fix: Prevents thin ice from being incorrectly flagged as 'Water' during post-processing.
eclipticseasons.configuration.DistantHor:
Force Distant Horizons to refresh all LODs timely.
WARNING: Enabling this may cause a full LOD rebuild and significant lag spikes.
eclipticseasons.configuration.ShouldInit: Initialize Snow Cover in Extreme Cold Biomes
eclipticseasons.configuration.GrowthDete: Use classic chat messages to display growth detector results instead of the new in-world UI.
eclipticseasons.configuration.CropLeaves: In compatibility mode, withers leaf blocks that should decay when their crop growth tick check fails.
eclipticseasons.configuration.HumidityTa: The effective radius of the Humidity Tank. When activated, it increases the ambient humidity within its range.
eclipticseasons.configuration.WanderingT: Whether Wandering Traders can sell Seasonal Greenhouse Essence.
eclipticseasons.configuration.TweakPreci: When enabled, Ecliptic Seasons may adjust rain and snow particle textures when needed.
Collect pumpkin seeds to prepare for the next autumn
advancement.eclipticseasons.dehumidifier: Craft this block to decrease greenhouse humidity
Build a sealed space that traps warmth and air—just like nature's cheat code!
advancement.eclipticseasons.greenhouse_c: Power up your greenhouse by placing a Greenhouse Essence into its heart
Install a Greenhouse Core Container, then grow what nature says you shouldn't
Do not walk directly under the sun in hot communities during the summer afternoon. If necessary, bring heat-resistant gear or take ice and snow to cool down
advancement.eclipticseasons.humidity_tan: Craft this block to increase greenhouse humidity
advancement.eclipticseasons.quest.desc: Each seasonal advancement line rewards a corresponding Greenhouse Essence
advancement.eclipticseasons.root.desc: Span a year with twenty-four solar terms
advancement.eclipticseasons.seasonal_pra: Craft a Seasonal Prayer Scroll to obtain more Greenhouse Essences
advancement.eclipticseasons.seasonal_rit: Use a Seasonal Prayer Scroll on a Greenhouse Heart Container, then wait for it to nurture the core of the current season
advancement.eclipticseasons.spring_bread: After hard work, enjoy a hearty meal~
advancement.eclipticseasons.spring_harve: Harvest wheat in the lingering spring
advancement.eclipticseasons.spring_hay.d: Craft hay bales to store your harvest
Collect wheat seeds to prepare for the next spring
advancement.eclipticseasons.spring_start: Plant wheat as all things grow
advancement.eclipticseasons.summer_glist: Craft a glistering melon slice. What is this?
advancement.eclipticseasons.summer_harve: Cool off with watermelons in the scorching summer
advancement.eclipticseasons.summer_melon: Can anyone eat a whole watermelon?
Collect watermelon seeds to prepare for the next summer
advancement.eclipticseasons.summer_start: Prepare to enjoy watermelons in the heat of summer~
Let's celebrate a year of good harvest~
advancement.eclipticseasons.winter_campf: Snowy night, warm fire, and me
advancement.eclipticseasons.winter_carpe: Oh dear, don't catch a cold
advancement.eclipticseasons.winter_harve: Collect powder snow using a cauldron when it snows
advancement.eclipticseasons.winter_start: Get ready to grab a broom and sweep the snow~
effect.eclipticseasons.heat_stroke.descr: The scorching heat is unbearable, and your vision gradually blurs.
info.eclipticseasons.bone_meal.failure: Cannot accelerate growth under current conditions.
info.eclipticseasons.calendar.use: §7§oPlace on a wall; sneak to switch calendar display modes
info.eclipticseasons.environment.season_: The daytime decreases when the nighttime increases.
Cool breeze arrives, autumn fills the sky.
The old year has passed, snow fills the door.
Fileds in bloom, spring holds its breath.
Winds wither white grass, sky dim and dark.
Frost surprises the evening, cold lights the forest tips.
The sense of autumn wanes, and chill begins to rise.
With the winter rain, the weather grows much colder.
Swallows return as spring renews the land.
Winds graze the field. Insects chirp.
Soft rain falls unseen, as birdsong fills the air.
Winds died away, but icy coldness still.
The color of warm summer has faded.
Snow fills the world, as if trees were blooming with pear blossoms.
Severe cold in the depth of winter.
Summer warmth insufficient, hints of autumn.
Cold wind roars fiercely, snow falls thick.
Cold winter wanes, spring is still faint.
It's just as warm as it is cold. Day and night are as long as each other.
Oh, the longest day is coming.
The aura of winter is getting thicker and thicker.
Shadows become longer. The endless long night comes.
Dust fills the air, and not a drop of rain in sight.
The rivers runs bare and dry.
Dust veils the fields. Green leaves wither.
A weary breeze, the sun rests upon the hills.
The daytime decreases when the nighttime increases.
Winds dry the grass, leaves droop low.
Heat departs, yet autumn’s breath remains.
Summer heat fades, autumn rains near.
Winds graze the field. Insects chirp.
Dark skies hang, soft wind and wet air.
Winds died away, but icy coldness still.
Sparse cold rains, leisurely tapping leaves.
Insect calls stir, thunder rumbles near.
North winds chill, occasional snow falls.
Maple leaves red, chilly winds rise.
Soft spring rains, flowers bloom full.
It's just warm enough. Day and night are as long as each other.
Oh, the longest day is coming.
Heat withdraws, new coolness follows rain.
Shadows become longer. The endless long night comes.
Rain falls for days, and clear skies are rare.
Heavy raindrops fall. Streams swell into rivers.
Rain pours from the sky. Thunders roar like dragons.
Heavy humidity lingers, and the heat is unbearable.
Rains grow sparse. Winds gradually calm.
The world steams, and all trees thrive.
Moisture hangs heavy, and the heat is suffocating.
info.eclipticseasons.environment.solar_t: The daytime decreases when the nighttime increases.
The color of summer has faded.
Spring coming back, all things awaken.
The last spring has gone and the summer is coming.
The aura of autumn is getting thicker and thicker.
The summer heat has been swept away as the autumn rains are ready.
Swallows return, and pear blossoms wither.
Winds graze the field. Insects chirp.
It rains noiselessly, but cuckoo crows.
Winds died away, but icy coldness still.
Snow begins to fall and decorate the world.
Severe cold in the depth of winter.
Crops are growing, maturing and waiting for the harvest.
With the winter rain, the weather grows much colder.
It's just as warm as it is cold. Day and night are as long as each other.
Oh, the longest day is coming.
Cool winds graze. White dew gathers.
Shadows become longer. The endless long night comes.
info.eclipticseasons.greenhouse_core.eff: Boosts %2$s crops within %1$s blocks in a greenhouse
Transform a Greenhouse Core Container into a %1$s Season Greenhouse Core
info.eclipticseasons.seasonal_prayer_scr: Activate the Container of Greenhouse Core to perform a seasonal ritual
info.eclipticseasons.snow_cauldron.extra: §7§oUse a shovel to obtain Snow Balls
patchouli_books.eclipticseasons.seasons_: Each season leaves a mark — the "Chronicle of the Seasons" records them all.
task.eclipticseasons.clean_snow.desc: Applied to snow-covered blocks from Ecliptic Season
